public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quartermaster.
manner: Sounds hospitable until terms blur, then becomes sharply attentive to cost and precedent. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a quartermaster still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quartermaster in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of quartermaster while managing the immediate pressure of storm weather in Cosmouth.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around Cosmoria, that usually means carrying storm weather, trade vulnerability, archive and tax discipline without letting the role of quartermaster visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Coralyn Foamglass can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Coralyn Foamglass will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Coralyn Foamglass read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Cosmoria, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Cosmouth.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
